headline: Centene (CNC) Stock Could Be 11.1% Overvalued After Employee Buyout Plan
summary: Centene (CNC) has drawn fresh attention after launching a voluntary buyout program for most employees, in response to a substantial drop in health plan membership tied to expiring federal pandemic subsidies and higher consumer costs. See our latest analysis for Centene. At a share price of $61.02, Centene has seen a 77.38% 90 day share price return and a 46.05% year to date share price return, while the 5 year total shareholder return has declined 17.43%. This suggests strong recent momentum...
